name: ThemeToggle

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the toggle button.

parameters.name: IncludeSystem
parameters.description: When true (default) the toggle walks the full three-way mode cycle (System → Dark → Light). Set to false for a binary Light ↔ Dark toggle: every click visibly changes the theme — the System step is skipped (useful in app shells where an "invisible" System→Dark click reads as a broken button when the OS is already dark).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the toggle button, merged with the Tooltip AsChild slot's own attributes.

examples.title: In a Navbar
examples.code:
<Flex Align="center" Justify="between" Class="rounded-lg border bg-card px-4 py-2">
    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Weight="semibold">My App</Lumeo.Text>
    <Flex Align="center" Gap="2">
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">About</Button>
        <ThemeToggle />
    </Flex>
</Flex>

examples.title: With Label
examples.code:
<Flex Align="center" Gap="3" Class="rounded-lg border bg-card px-4 py-3">
    <ThemeToggle />
    <Stack Gap="0">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Weight="medium">Dark Mode</Lumeo.Text>
        <Lumeo.Text Size="xs" Color="muted">Toggle light and dark theme</Lumeo.Text>
    </Stack>
</Flex>

mdSummary:
# ThemeToggle

Dark/light mode toggle button.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/theme-toggle

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ThemeToggle | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the toggle button. |
| ThemeToggle | IncludeSystem | `bool` | `true` | When true (default) the toggle walks the full three-way mode cycle (System → Dark → Light). Set to false for a binary Light ↔ Dark toggle: every click visibly changes the theme — the System step is skipped (useful in app shells where an "invisible" System→Dark click reads as a broken button when the OS is already dark). |
| ThemeToggle | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures unmatched attributes and applies them to the toggle button, merged with the Tooltip AsChild slot's own attributes. |

## Slots
- (none)

- (none)

## Example

```razor
<ThemeToggle />
```

## CSS variables
